summary: Large but mostly focused stage/zako generator decompilation PR. It replaced many grZakoGenerator placeholders with typed implementations, moved core grZakoGenerator structs into gr/types.h, corrected function signatures and call sites to use grZakoGenerator_SpawnDesc*, grZakoGenerator_Config*, Item_GObj*, HSD_GObj*, and NULL instead of integer/boolean zero, and added several adjacent stage matches in Corneria, Rainbow Cruise, Old Kongo, Heal, and Ice Mountain. The decomp.dev report credited 14 new matches and +4212 matched code bytes, led by grZakoGenerator_801CA8B4, grZakoGenerator_801CA43C, grZakoGenerator_801CA67C, grZakoGenerator_801CAF08, and grZakoGenerator_801CAE04, while noting one small regression in grCorneria_801E2738.
what_changed: Implemented major grZakoGenerator routines that were previously placeholders or untyped stubs, including grZakoGenerator_801CA43C, grZakoGenerator_801CA67C, grZakoGenerator_801CA8B4, grZakoGenerator_801CACB8, grZakoGenerator_801CAE04, and grZakoGenerator_801CAF08.

Changed grZakoGenerator_801CA394 from an int/void* allocation helper into a typed allocator returning grZakoGenerator_Config* and accepting grZakoGenerator_Spawn*, count, grZakoGenerator_SpawnFunc, and f32 probability/behavior parameter.

Added typed grZakoGenerator_SpawnDesc, grZakoGenerator_Spawn, grZakoGenerator_SpawnFunc, grZakoGenerator_Config, grZakoGenerator_Entry, and grZakoGenerator_Data definitions to gr/types.h, and simplified grzakogenerator.static.h to only define the static lbl_8049F030 state using those shared types.

Updated grZakoGenerator_801CAE04 to return HSD_GObj* and accept grZakoGenerator_SpawnDesc*, allocate generator data, create a ground GObj, install fn_801CADBC as a proc, and store global spawn descriptor/data pointers.
Mass-updated stage OnStart/init call sites from grZakoGenerator_801CAE04(0) or grZakoGenerator_801CAE04(false) to grZakoGenerator_801CAE04(NULL), reflecting the recovered pointer parameter.

Implemented grZakoGenerator_801CA8B4 as the main respawn/placement loop using stage blast-zone and camera bounds, Ground_801C2D24 position lookup, item creation for several zako kinds, and item-var index bookkeeping.
Implemented grZakoGenerator_801CAF08 to disable generator activity and destroy live zako-related item objects by walking HSD_GObj_Entities->items.
Added itZako_ItemVars with an idx field in itCharItems.h and changed grZakoGenerator destruction paths to use ip->xDD4_itemVar.zako.idx instead of raw offset access.
Corrected grZakoGenerator_801CACB8 to take Item_GObj* instead of Ground_GObj*, and updated it_8027CE44 accordingly.

Recovered grCorneria_801DD9A8, including calls to grCorneria_801E1970, grCorneria_801E2228, grZakoGenerator_801CA43C for two Corneria generator configs, several stage update helpers, five lb_8000B1CC transforms, Ground_801C2FE0, and lb_800115F4.
Typed Corneria data access by replacing raw pad indexing with grCn_Data fields indices[3] and positions[34] in grCorneria_801DDDA8.
Adjusted Corneria generator callback signatures grCorneria_801E2454 and grCorneria_801E2480 to accept Vec3* plus s32 and return HSD_Generator*.
Implemented grFigureGet_80219B10 collision/item callback logic for collecting coin Item_GObj pointers and values into figureget ground vars when coins are in a small x range.
Implemented grHeal_8021F0D8 to start stage animation and conditionally invoke grHeal_8021F79C based on gm_80473A18.x90 and grHeal_804D49D8.

Improved grIceMt_801F7080 to use a small rand_zero inline, pass grIm_804D69F4->xBC as a typed grZakoGenerator_SpawnDesc, call grZakoGenerator_801CAEB0 with Ground_801C5840()/Ground_801C5940(), and correct a grLib_801C96F8 effect ID from 0x7534 to 0x7530.
Recovered grAnime_801C84A4 to search animation AObjs via HSD_ForeachAnim, a computed HSD_TypeMask, __setjmp protection, and HSD_AObjGetFlags(result) & 0x04000000.
smart_moves: Centralized recovered grZakoGenerator layouts in gr/types.h instead of leaving duplicate private struct definitions in grzakogenerator.static.h, making dependent stage and item code type-checkable.
Converted widespread integer-zero arguments to NULL after recovering grZakoGenerator_801CAE04 as a pointer-taking API; this documents intent and prevents future accidental bool/int assumptions.
Used item-specific storage ip->xDD4_itemVar.zako.idx for generator bookkeeping, avoiding brittle raw offset casts and aligning item destroy/respawn code with the project’s item-var pattern.
Recovered generator callback typing as HSD_Generator* (*)(Vec3*, s32), which explained why Corneria callbacks needed an unused s32 parameter even when the implementation ignores it.

Named the final grZakoGenerator_Data entry as a sentinel rather than preserving opaque x3C0/x3C4/x3C8 fields, clarifying the special singleton slot behavior in grZakoGenerator_801CAEB0 and destruction paths.
In grZakoGenerator_801CA43C, separated transformed spawn segments from source spawn descriptors and used interpolation along pos0/pos1 to derive spawn positions at a target height.
Preserved matching-oriented control flow idioms such as assignment inside if conditions in grIceMt_801F7080 and stack padding/PAD_STACK where needed.
Added targeted forward/type includes in stage headers and C files instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS prototypes, enabling more precise cross-TU signatures.
decomp_lessons: When a function is called from many stage OnStart routines with 0/false, check whether the parameter is actually a pointer before propagating an integer or bool signature; after recovery, update all call sites to NULL for readability and type safety.
For stage generators, callback signatures may include an index parameter even if some callbacks ignore it; matching the callback typedef globally can unlock multiple stage files.
Opaque ground vars often become clear once the generator/item ownership chain is typed: Corneria xC8/xCC became grZakoGenerator_Config* fields, and item var DD8 became zako.idx.

Sentinel entries are often better represented as the same entry type appended after an array than as unrelated trailing scalar fields; this improved grZakoGenerator_Data from entries[80] plus raw x3C0/x3C4/x3C8 into entries[80] plus sentinel.
Replacing raw pad access with named arrays, as in grCn_Data indices and positions, can both improve readability and finish near-matches without inventing high-level semantics.
Generator cleanup code may need to traverse global item entity lists and filter by item-kind ranges; recover the range checks exactly before naming behavior too specifically.
Small helper inlines such as rand_zero can be useful matching tools when the original compiler emits a repeated ternary/random pattern.
One PR can mix exact matches and near-matches; keep bot-reported regressions visible because even a -1 byte broken match, like grCorneria_801E2738, may matter for follow-up cleanup.
naming_conventions: Recovered generator types use the grZakoGenerator_ prefix: grZakoGenerator_SpawnDesc, grZakoGenerator_Spawn, grZakoGenerator_SpawnFunc, grZakoGenerator_Config, grZakoGenerator_Entry, and grZakoGenerator_Data.
The shared static state remains named lbl_8049F030 in grzakogenerator.static.h, but its fields were typed rather than renamed beyond x0/x4/x8 bitfields.
The final grZakoGenerator_Data slot is named sentinel, replacing raw trailing fields x3C0, x3C4, and x3C8.
Item-specific per-item variables follow the existing it<Thing>_ItemVars convention, adding itZako_ItemVars with idx at DD8.
Stage-specific ground vars kept address-like field names such as xC8, xCC, and xD0 where semantics were still weak, but their types were improved where known.
Unmatched or uncertain functions retained address-based names such as grZakoGenerator_801CA8B4, grCorneria_801DD9A8, and grFigureGet_80219B10 rather than receiving speculative descriptive names.
Callback typedef naming uses SpawnFunc and callback fields rather than over-specific enemy/effect names, matching the evidence that callbacks create HSD_Generator effects.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used PAD_STACK in grZakoGenerator_801CA43C, grZakoGenerator_801CA67C, grZakoGenerator_801CA8B4, and grZakoGenerator_801CAF08 to preserve stack layout for matching.
Used an inline interpolation helper in grZakoGenerator_801CA43C to match position calculation codegen for pos->x/y/z from pos0/pos1 and t.
Preserved comma-style assignment in the inline helper for pos->y, likely for codegen matching.
Used ABS(dy) > 0.0001f and HSD_Randf branches to distinguish deterministic crossing interpolation from random interpolation for horizontal/equal-height spawn segments.
Used __assert with the literal file name grzakogenerator.c and line 0x52 in grZakoGenerator_801CA67C, matching the original assertion site.
Used OSReport with the literal 'couldn t get gobj!' error path and line 0x166 in grZakoGenerator_801CAE04.
Used HSD_GObj_SetupProc(gobj, fn_801CADBC, 0) and made fn_801CADBC accept HSD_GObj* while forwarding to grZakoGenerator_801CA8B4(0).
Used assignment-in-if style for repeated Ground_801C2BA4 lookups in grIceMt_801F7080, reducing temporary churn and matching generated code.
Recovered grAnime_801C84A4 with a local HSD_AObj* sp14, HSD_ForeachAnim, AOBJ_ARG_AV, and __setjmp guard, indicating matching depended on exact animation traversal scaffolding.
Function signature corrections in itlikelike, itpatapata, and itzgshell propagated extra s32 parameters needed by grZakoGenerator item creation calls.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the slice.
The PR body described the change as 'slightly sprawling, but mostly zako stuff', which is consistent with 81 changed files but a grZakoGenerator-centered core.
decomp.dev reported matched code increased to 61.69%, +0.11%, +4212 bytes, and matched data increased by +56 bytes.

decomp.dev listed 14 new matches, including grZakoGenerator_801CA8B4, grZakoGenerator_801CA43C, grZakoGenerator_801CA67C, grOldKongo_8020F6E4, grCorneria_801DD9A8, grRCruise_801FF5B4, fn_80200460, grZakoGenerator_801CAF08, grZakoGenerator_801CAE04, grHeal_8021F0D8, grIceMt_801F7080, and grCorneria_801DDDA8.
decomp.dev also reported 12 improvements in unmatched items, including grFigureGet_80219B10 to 99.18%, grZakoGenerator_801CACB8 to 91.68%, and grAnime_801C84A4 to 97.92%.
decomp.dev noted one broken match: grCorneria_801E2738 decreased from 100.00% to 99.82% by 1 byte.
follow_up_queries: Check whether the one-byte grCorneria_801E2738 regression introduced by PR #2374 was fixed in a later PR.
Search later grzakogenerator work for renamed x0/x4/x8 fields in lbl_8049F030 or semantic names for grZakoGenerator_Config.x10/x18.
Look for follow-up PRs that finish grZakoGenerator_801CACB8, grZakoGenerator_801CAEB0, grFigureGet_80219B10, and grAnime_801C84A4 from near-match to full match.
Find later type recovery for grCorneria_GroundVars arwing/corneria union fields affected by xC8/xCC config pointers.
Audit other item creation functions for extra unused s32 parameters matching the pattern added to it_802DC4BC and it_802E16F8.
